title: tauschia moorei
intro: Tauschia moorei, also known as Mountain Substitue or Yerba Buena, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Tauschia moorei include reducing inflammation and promoting tissue repair, as well as providing antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Tauschia moorei include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
